result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate beautiful HTML reports from TRX test result files

Usage:
  PrettyTRX.Console [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Root folder path to scan for TRX files
  -o, --output <output>         Output path for the HTML report (optional, defaults to test-report.html in the scanned folder)
  -t, --theme <theme>           Theme for the HTML report (light, dark, highcontrast) [default: light]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate beautiful HTML reports from TRX test result files

Usage:
  PrettyTRX.Console [options]

Options:
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Root folder path to scan for TRX files
  -o, --output <output>         Output path for the HTML report (optional, defaults to test-report.html in the scanned folder)
  -t, --theme <theme>           Theme for the HTML report (light, dark, highcontrast) [default: light]
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
